nodes.name: Schedule: Weekday 9am AEST
nodes.notes: Runs weekdays 9am. Set the workflow timezone to Australia/Sydney in workflow settings. You can also run it manually with Execute Workflow.

nodes.name: Read Prospects Sheet
nodes.notes: Replace 126nIrd5RM9rvvgaAN2eKlNkQktL0BQ4p6dwKkEULKLg with the real DA - Outbound Prospects sheet id. Prospects must be the first tab (gid=0).

parameters.jsCode:
// Flatten to just the sheet columns for the Google Sheets update node.
return { json: $json.sheet_row };

nodes.name: Update Sheet: Awaiting Approval
nodes.notes: Matches on prospect_id, sets status awaiting_approval and writes the qualifier + opener fields.

nodes.name: Telegram: Opener + Approve Buttons
nodes.notes: Buttons are inert until workflow-c is extended to handle the op_ callback prefix (Phase 2).

nodes.name: Update Sheet: Manual Review
nodes.notes: Weak fits: status manual_review, no opener drafted.

nodes.name: Update Sheet: Not Fit
nodes.notes: not_fit or qualifier failure: status not_fit, dropped.
